errorHint: Make sure the server is running and your network connection is stable

info.day:
Comparison of cumulative expenses from the start of the month to today against the same period of the previous month.
Example: October 1 to 5 vs September 1 to 5.
info.week:
Comparison of cumulative expenses for the past week against the previous week.
Example: week of October 6 vs week of October 13.
info.month:
Comparison of total spending since the start of the month against the previous month. Note: results may be inaccurate early in the month.
Example: October vs September.
info.year:
Comparison of this year's expenses against last year's.
Example: 2025 vs 2024.
